body:
## Rationale

**Proven format:** Igor Cavalera lick pages are the #4 and #5 most-viewed pages on the site (GA4 last 7d: `/drummers/igor-cavalera/licks/igor-cavalera-refuse-resist-double-bass` = 9 views, `/drummers/igor-cavalera/licks/igor-cavalera-roots-bloody-roots-tribal-groove` = 6 views). These outperform most album articles.

**Target drummers (highest priority):**

| Drummer | GSC Signal | Why now |
|---|---|---|
| **Matt Greiner** | 44.44% CTR (9 impr) — our highest-converting query | "matt greiner drum setup" query proves intent exists; lick pages would capture "matt greiner drum fill" / "matt greiner technique" queries |
| **Joey Jordison** | 67 impr total — our highest-impression query bucket | Joey has a shopping guide and kit article but ZERO lick pages; lick format fills the technique-search gap |

**Gap confirmed:**
- No lick pages exist for Matt Greiner or Joey Jordison (checked `/drummers/matt-greiner/licks/` and `/drummers/joey-jordison/licks/` route pattern)
- Only #2219 (Nick Menza + Sean Reinert lick pages) is in open proposals; Matt Greiner and Joey Jordison not covered

## Files to touch

For each drummer, create **3 lick pages** following the Igor Cavalera pattern:

**Matt Greiner (August Burns Red):**
- `/drummers/matt-greiner/licks/matt-greiner-messengers-blast-groove` — Messengers-era blast-to-groove transitions (his signature technique)
- `/drummers/matt-greiner/licks/matt-greiner-constellations-polyrhythm` — Constellations polyrhythmic patterns (progressive breakdowns)
- `/drummers/matt-greiner/licks/matt-greiner-leveler-double-bass` — Leveler double-bass run patterns

**Joey Jordison (Slipknot):**
- `/drummers/joey-jordison/licks/joey-jordison-iowa-double-bass` — Iowa-era pedal work (the defining Slipknot double-bass pattern)
- `/drummers/joey-jordison/licks/joey-jordison-people-snare-pattern` — "(sic)"-style snare displacement
- `/drummers/joey-jordison/licks/joey-jordison-three-hundred-blast` — "The Heretic Anthem" blast-beat run

Each lick page follows the existing lick page data format (slug, title, drummer, description, technique notes, difficulty, video timestamp if applicable).

**LLM companion files:**
- `public/llms/articles/matt-greiner-licks.md` — summary of all Matt Greiner lick pages
- `public/llms/articles/joey-jordison-licks.md` — summary of all Joey Jordison lick pages

## Quality gate per lick page
- Technique description ≥150 words
- BPM / time signature metadata
- Difficulty rating
- Internal link back to drummer profile and ≥1 album article
- BreadcrumbList schema

## Estimated page count: 6 lick pages + 2 LLM summary files

## Estimated organic uplift
Directly targets "matt greiner drum fill", "joey jordison double bass pattern", "how to play matt greiner style" queries — high intent, zero current coverage. Igor Cavalera lick pages prove the format converts at 5.4 avg session time (GA4).

## Verify
1. All 6 lick URLs return 200 status
2. BreadcrumbList schema present on each lick page
3. Internal links to drummer profiles resolve
4. LLM companion files exist in `public/llms/articles/`
5. Matt Greiner and Joey Jordison lick index pages are accessible

## Done
When all 6 lick pages are live with schema, internal links, and LLM companions.
title: SEO batch: Lick pages for Matt Greiner + Joey Jordison (~6 lick pages + 2 LLM files — proven GA4 format, targets 44% CTR Greiner + 67-impr Jordison query clusters)
